dividends.calendarSubtitle: All important dates for BVB investors
dividends.seoCalendarDesc: Complete calendar of dividends for BVB-listed companies. Ex-dividend dates, yields and corporate events.
dividends.exportError: Export error. Check your PRO subscription.
dividends.exDividendGlossary: The last day you can buy the stock and receive the dividend. After this date, the buyer does NOT receive the dividend.
dividends.recordDateGlossary: The date when the central depository verifies who holds the shares.
dividends.paymentDateGlossary: The date the dividend is transferred to your broker account.
dividends.yieldGlossary: How much you receive in dividends relative to the stock price.
dividends.yieldFormula: Yield = (Dividend per share / Current price) x 100
dividends.taxDividend: Dividend tax: 16% withheld at source (Law 141/2025, applicable from 01.01.2026)
dividends.cassApplies: CASS: Health contribution of 10% may apply if investment income exceeds 6 gross minimum wages (28,200 RON in 2026)
dividends.estimatesNote: Estimates: Dividends marked 'Estimate' are based on company announcements, not officially confirmed
dividends.legalBasisCalendar: Legal basis: Tax Code 2026 - art. 97 (dividend tax) + art. 156 (CASS)
dividends.usageGuideText: This glossary contains essential terms from the world of investments and finance. Use the search bar to quickly find definitions or browse alphabetically.
dividends.addStocksDesc: Add stocks and specify the number of shares
dividends.addStocksBelow: Add stocks from the table below
dividends.growthRateNote: Dividend growth rate: {{rate}}%/year • Tax 16% + CASS included
dividends.proHistoryDesc: Access advanced analysis: Dividend Score, CAGR, stability, yearly charts and complete BVB ranking.
dividends.scoreCalc: Score: Stability (40%) + Growth (30%) + Yield (30%) • BVB.ro + historical
dividends.growthRateDesc: Dividend growth rate: {{rate}}%/year - Tax 16% + CASS included
dividends.proHistoryAccess: Access advanced analysis: Dividend Score, CAGR, stability, yearly charts and complete BVB ranking.
dividends.comparisonSubtitle: Dividend per year (RON/share) - Source: BVB.ro + historical data
dividends.rankingDesc: Score: Stability (40%) + Growth (30%) + Yield (30%) - Source: BVB.ro + historical
dividends.calcSubtitle: Calculate your passive income from dividends - Official BVB.ro data
dividends.taxInfoDesc: In Romania, dividends are taxed at 16% withheld at source. The calculator automatically includes this deduction.
dividends.sourceDivText: Official data from BVB.ro. Dividends shown are GROSS values (before tax).
dividends.sourcePriceText: Prices from the Bucharest Stock Exchange with ~15 min delay.
dividends.projection5yText: Uses an implicit 3%/year growth rate. Future dividends are not guaranteed and depend on company performance and AGM decisions.
dividends.taxDiv16: Dividend tax: 16% withheld at source - Law 141/2025 (applicable from 01.01.2026)
dividends.cassHealthDesc: CASS (Health Contribution): 10% applies if investment income exceeds 6 gross minimum wages. Gross minimum wage 2026: 4,700 RON.
dividends.legalBasis: Legal basis: Tax Code 2026 - art. 97 (tax) + art. 156 (CASS)
dividends.disclaimerCalc: Calculations are educational and indicative. Future dividends may vary. This does not constitute investment advice or tax consulting. For your specific situation, consult a certified tax advisor.
dividends.addAtLeastOne: Add at least one stock to portfolio
dividends.seoDesc: Calculate your dividend income on BVB. Multi-year projections with automatic reinvestment.

portfolio.title: BVB Portfolio PRO
portfolio.subtitle: Live BVB data · PRO Exclusive
portfolio.emptyDesc: Add positions manually or import directly from XTB / Tradeville with a CSV.
portfolio.deleteConfirm: Position will be permanently removed from portfolio.
portfolio.liveDataNote: Live BVB data · RSI(14) · Prices with 15min delay · Updated on refresh
portfolio.dividendSourceNote: Source: BVB.ro official · Trailing 12 months · Gross dividend per share (before tax)
portfolio.bvbPricesDesc: Prices come from the Bucharest Stock Exchange with ~15 minute delay. For real-time prices, check directly on BVB.ro.
portfolio.plDescription: Calculated based on the entry price you entered and the current BVB price.
portfolio.plFormula: P&L = (Current Price - Entry Price) x Quantity
portfolio.rsiDescription: Standard technical indicator calculated mathematically from closing prices of the last 14 trading days. Not investment advice.
portfolio.rsiFormula: RSI = 100 - (100 / (1 + RS)), where RS = Average gains / Average losses (14 days)
portfolio.divYieldDescription: Calculated from dividends paid in the last 12 months (trailing), from official BVB.ro data.
portfolio.divYieldFormula: Yield = (Sum of trailing 12m dividends / Current price) x 100
portfolio.plTooltip: Profit/Loss = (Current Price - Entry Price) x Quantity · Percent = P&L / Invested x 100
portfolio.rsiTooltip: Relative Strength Index (14 days) · Calculated mathematically from BVB closing prices · <30 = Oversold, >70 = Overbought
portfolio.divYieldTooltip: Dividend yield = Trailing 12m dividend / Current price x 100 · Dividend source: BVB.ro official
portfolio.divSourceDesc: Data is extracted directly from BVB.ro (Dividend Calendar). These are gross dividends (before 16% tax).
portfolio.divYieldCalcDesc: Calculated as the ratio between dividends paid in the last 12 months and the current share price.
portfolio.annualIncomeDesc: Based on dividends from the last 12 months. Future dividends may differ. Check company reports.
portfolio.annualIncomeFormula: Income = Dividend per share x Number of shares held
portfolio.divTaxDesc: Dividends shown are GROSS. Dividend tax in Romania is 16%, withheld at source (2026, Law 141/2025).

pricing.title: Choose the Right Plan
pricing.subtitle: Start free, upgrade to PRO for advanced features
pricing.cancelAnswer: Yes! You can cancel your PRO subscription anytime. You'll have access until the end of the paid period.
pricing.paymentMethods: What payment methods do you accept?
pricing.paymentAnswer: We accept bank cards through Stripe (secured). More methods coming soon.
pricing.proDescription: All advanced features for serious investors
pricing.seoDesc: Choose the right plan for you. PRO: 49 RON/month or 490 RON/year. Full access to all advanced features.
pricing.faqCancelA: Yes! You can cancel your PRO subscription anytime. You'll have access until the end of the paid period.
pricing.faqPaymentQ: What payment methods do you accept?
pricing.faqPaymentA: We accept bank cards through Stripe (secured). More methods coming soon.
pricing.faqSwitchQ: Can I switch from monthly to annual?
pricing.faqSwitchA: Yes! You can switch to the annual plan anytime and save 2 months.
pricing.faqTrialA: Yes! Currently PRO is free until June 5, 2026. Sign up now for full access.
pricing.whyPro1Desc: The Tax Calculator shows you exactly how to optimize your investment taxation. A single correct calculation can mean savings of 10,000-50,000 RON annually.
pricing.whyPro2Desc: Unlimited AI Advisor means you can ask anything, anytime. Learn at your own pace, without counting questions.
pricing.whyPro3Desc: Reduced delays: 15min for BVB (vs 30min) and 1 second for Global Markets (vs 15min). React faster to the market.
pricing.whyPro4Desc: Unlimited watchlist and alerts for all portfolio companies. Don't choose between stocks — track them all.
pricing.faqWhyPayQ: Why pay for an education platform?
pricing.faqWhyPayA: Education (lessons and courses) remains 100% FREE! The PRO plan unlocks PROFESSIONAL TOOLS like the Tax Calculator (can save tens of thousands of RON), unlimited AI, faster data and advanced analysis features.
pricing.faqCalcQ: Is the Tax Calculator worth the investment?
pricing.faqCalcA: Absolutely! A single correct calculation about taxation (PF vs SRL) can save 10,000-50,000 RON per year for active investors. The PRO subscription pays for itself in the first month if you invest seriously on BVB or internationally.
pricing.faqDelayQ: What do different data delays mean?
pricing.faqDelayA: FREE users get data with a longer delay (30min BVB, 15min Global), sufficient for analysis and education. PRO users get faster data (15min BVB, 1s Global), essential for faster trading decisions.
pricing.faqWatchlistQ: Why limits on watchlist and alerts?
pricing.faqWatchlistA: The FREE plan allows 3 stocks in watchlist and alerts for 2 companies - perfect for starting out. PRO offers unlimited watchlist and alerts, necessary when you have a diversified portfolio.
pricing.faqQuizQ: What does 'all levels without quiz' mean?
pricing.faqQuizA: FREE users must pass a quiz (min 7/10 correct) to advance to Medium and Expert levels. PRO users have DIRECT access to all 3 levels from day one.
pricing.allLevelsNoQuiz: Access to all levels without quiz

about.title: Our Mission
about.subtitle: To democratize financial education in Romania
about.joinThousands: Join thousands of Romanians learning trading on FinRomania. Free, in Romanian, with real data.
about.whyParagraph1: In Romania, financial education is almost non-existent. Millions of Romanians want to learn about investing, the stock exchange, and trading - but quality resources in Romanian are rare or very expensive.
about.whyParagraph2: FinRomania was created to change that. We believe every Romanian deserves access to quality financial education, regardless of income or background. That's why we built the first completely free educational trading platform in Romania.
about.freeValueDesc: Education shouldn't cost anything. Everything is free, forever.
about.qualityValueDesc: Real data, professional lessons, advanced AI - we never compromise.
about.innovationValueDesc: First platform with AI Advisor and interactive lessons in Romanian.
about.communityValueDesc: We're building a community of educated investors in Romania.
about.featureRealBVBDesc: Live prices from the Bucharest Stock Exchange, updated every 5 minutes. We don't use simulated data - see the real market!
about.featureTradingSchoolDesc: 17 complete lessons with quizzes and practical scenarios. From beginner to advanced, you learn through guided practice.
about.featureAIAdvisorDesc: AI assistant that answers your questions about trading, investing, and financial analysis - available 24/7.
about.featureProToolsDesc: Glossary of 99 terms, live currency converter, automated news, risk assessment - everything you need to get started.

contact.faqUpdateFreqQ: How often is the data updated?
contact.faqUpdateFreqA: BNR exchange rates are updated daily. Global indices and news update every 15 minutes.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Have questions? We have answers!
faq.description: Everything you need to know about FinRomania
faq.general_a1: FinRomania is a financial education and market analysis platform for Romanian investors. We offer live BVB and Global Markets data, analysis tools, free courses and an AI assistant — all in Romanian!
faq.general_a2: YES! The FREE plan includes: full education (32 lessons), BVB & Global data, news, currency converter, 5 AI questions/day. The PRO plan (49 RON/month) unlocks: Tax Calculator, unlimited AI, faster data, technical indicators.
faq.general_a3: YES! We work with licensed financial data providers for BVB, global markets and BNR exchange rates. News from verified sources (ZF, Capital, Bursa). All data is real, not simulated.
faq.general_a4: For ANYONE who wants to learn about finance! From beginners (budgeting, savings) to active BVB investors. No prior knowledge needed — everything explained step by step.
faq.general_q5: Can I invest directly on the platform?
faq.general_a5: NO. FinRomania is an EDUCATION and ANALYSIS platform, not a broker. We provide data and knowledge for informed decisions. For real investments, you need an authorized broker (XTB, BT Capital Partners, etc.).
faq.pro_q1: What do I get with PRO?
faq.pro_a1: PRO (49 RON/month): Tax Calculator, unlimited AI, all levels without quizzes, unlimited watchlist (vs 3 FREE), unlimited alerts (vs 2 FREE), faster data (15min BVB vs 30min, 1s Global vs 15min), technical indicators, fundamental analysis.
faq.pro_q2: Is the Tax Calculator worth it?
faq.pro_a2: YES! A single correct calculation (Individual vs LLC) can save 10,000-50,000 RON/year for active investors. It pays for itself from the first month. Includes AI Tax Advisor for complex tax questions.
faq.pro_a3: FREE: BVB 30min delay, Global 15min (fine for education). PRO: BVB 15min delay, Global 1 second (essential for quick decisions). The data is real, only the refresh rate differs.
faq.pro_a4: Yes, anytime! No hidden costs. PRO access continues until the end of the paid period. Annual plan (490 RON) = 2 months savings vs monthly.
faq.edu_a1: A FREE program with 15 lessons: budgets (50/30/20), savings, inflation, pensions, Romanian taxes, ETF investing. For personal finance control.
faq.edu_q2: Difference between Education and Trading School?
faq.edu_a2: Education (15 lessons): THE BASICS — budgets, savings, taxes. Trading School (17 lessons): TRADING — technical analysis, strategies. Start with Education if you're new!
faq.edu_a3: NO! Courses start from ZERO. Everything explained step by step, with Romanian examples. Anyone can learn.
faq.security_a1: Auto-updated: BVB every 5 min, Global every 5 min, BNR daily, News every 15 min. Licensed providers for accuracy.
faq.security_a2: YES! Google authentication (no stored passwords), SSL, GDPR compliant. We don't sell data. Delete your account anytime.
faq.security_q3: Where does the data come from?
faq.security_a3: Licensed providers for BVB and Global data. Exchange rates from BNR. News from verified sources. All real.

pro.seoTitle: Try PRO - All Advanced Features | FinRomania
pro.seoDescription: Discover the differences between the Free and PRO plans: Tax Calculator, unlimited AI, faster data, unlimited watchlist and more.
pro.heroDesc1: From 5 AI questions per day to UNLIMITED.
pro.saveMoneyDesc: The Tax Calculator shows you exactly how to optimize your investment taxation. A single correct calculation can mean savings of 10,000-50,000 RON annually.
pro.learnNoLimitsDesc: Unlimited AI Advisor means you can ask anything, anytime. Learn at your own pace without counting questions.
pro.fasterDataDesc: Reduced delays: 15min for BVB (vs 30min) and 1 second for Global Markets (vs 15min). React faster to the market.
pro.completeMonitoringDesc: Unlimited watchlist and alerts for all companies in your portfolio. Stop choosing between stocks - track them all.
pro.faqQ1: Why pay for an education platform?
pro.faqA1: Education (lessons and courses) remains 100% FREE! The PRO plan unlocks PROFESSIONAL TOOLS like the Tax Calculator (can save tens of thousands of RON), unlimited AI, faster data and advanced analysis features. It's the difference between learning theory and having the tools to apply it in practice.
pro.faqQ2: Is the Tax Calculator really worth the investment?
pro.faqA2: Absolutely! A single correct calculation about taxation (PF vs SRL) can save 10,000-50,000 RON per year for active investors. The PRO subscription pays for itself from the first month if you invest seriously on BVB or internationally. It also includes AI Fiscal Advisor for complex questions.
pro.faqQ3: What do different data delays mean?
pro.faqA3: FREE users get data with a longer delay (30min BVB, 15min Global), sufficient for analysis and education. PRO users get faster data (15min BVB, 1s Global), essential for faster trading decisions and active monitoring.
pro.faqQ4: Why limits on watchlist and alerts?
pro.faqA4: The FREE plan allows 3 stocks in watchlist and alerts for 2 companies - perfect for getting started. PRO offers unlimited watchlist and alerts, necessary when you have a diversified portfolio with 5-15+ stocks and want to monitor them all.
pro.faqQ5: What does 'all levels without quiz' mean?
pro.faqA5: FREE users must pass a quiz (minimum 7 out of 10 correct answers) to advance to Medium and Expert levels. PRO users have DIRECT access to all 3 levels from day one, with all advanced features (technical indicators, fundamental analysis).
pro.faqA6: Yes, 100%! Cancel whenever you want, no hidden costs. You'll have access to PRO features until the end of the paid period. The annual plan (490 RON) saves you 2 months compared to monthly.
pro.faqQ7: What's the difference between monthly and annual plans?
pro.faqA7: Monthly plan: 49 RON/month (588 RON/year). Annual plan: 490 RON/year - you save 98 RON (2 free months). Both offer the same PRO features, only the price and billing period differ.
pro.faqQ8: How do payment and billing work?
pro.faqA8: Payment is made securely by bank card. You will receive a tax invoice for each payment. For the monthly plan, billing is automatic each month. You can cancel anytime from your account.
pro.secureCompliantDesc: The platform complies with GDPR legislation and security standards. Your data is protected with SSL encryption.

cfd.seoDesc: Learn the differences between CFD trading and stock investing. Pros, cons, and which is right for you.
cfd.heroDesc: Why platforms like Plus500 are NOT real stock exchanges and how to protect your money by investing correctly
cfd.warningTitle: Did you know 74-89% of retail accounts lose money on CFDs?
cfd.warningText: This is the mandatory warning that every regulated CFD broker must display under ESMA regulations. This is not a made-up statistic — it is the reality for millions of investors who confused CFD platforms with real stock exchanges.
cfd.whatIsCfdTitle: What is a CFD (Contract for Difference)?
cfd.whatIsCfdText: A CFD (Contract for Difference) is a derivative financial contract where you and the broker agree to exchange the price difference of an asset (stock, index, commodity) from the time the contract opens until it closes.
cfd.exampleRealText: You buy 100 TLV shares at 18 RON = 1,800 RON. If the price rises to 20 RON, you sell and earn 200 RON. If TLV pays 2 RON/share in dividends, you receive 200 RON in your bank account. You are the owner of those shares, registered at the Central Depository.
cfd.exampleCfdText: You open a CFD on TLV with 1,800 RON. If the price rises to 20 RON, you receive the 200 RON difference. The broker may credit a "dividend adjustment" to your account, but you are not an owner — you are not registered as a shareholder anywhere. If your loss exceeds 1,800 RON (due to leverage), you can end up in the red.
cfd.comparisonTitle: Direct comparison: Real Stocks vs. CFDs
cfd.marketHoursTitle: Why does Plus500 show data 24/7, while FinRomania shows "CLOSED" on Friday evening?
cfd.marketHoursReal: The real exchange (NYSE, BVB, etc.) operates on an official schedule. NYSE is open Monday-Friday, 3:30 PM - 10:00 PM (Romania time). It is CLOSED on weekends and legal holidays (Good Friday, Thanksgiving, Christmas, etc.). FinRomania displays real data from these exchanges, so when the exchange is closed, we show the last official price.
cfd.marketHoursCfd: Plus500 / CFD brokers don't send your orders to the exchange. You trade with the broker, who is your counterparty. They can display "synthetic" prices 24/7, based on futures or internal calculations. If you lose, the broker profits directly. This is their business model: a fundamental conflict of interest.
cfd.marketHoursWarning: Prices shown on Saturday or Sunday on Plus500 for the S&P 500 are not real exchange prices — they are broker-generated prices that may include wider spreads and do not reflect market reality.
cfd.leverageTitle: The danger of leverage — how you can lose more than you invested
cfd.leverageRealLine1: You invest 1,000 RON in TLV at 18 RON/share → 55 shares
cfd.leverageRealLine3: Your portfolio is now worth 495 RON
cfd.leverageRealLine5: The shares remain yours. The price can recover.
cfd.leverageCfdLine1: You deposit 1,000 RON as margin and control a 10,000 RON position
cfd.leverageCfdLine3: You've lost 100% of your deposited amount!
cfd.leverageCfdLine4: If the market drops further → margin call or negative balance
cfd.leverageCfdLine5: You could end up owing money to the broker.
cfd.alternativesTitle: How to invest correctly — healthy alternatives
cfd.altBvbDesc: Buy real shares in Romanian companies (TLV, SNP, BRD, H2O, SNN). Receive dividends, be a real owner.
cfd.altDivDesc: Plan your passive income from BVB dividends with our 2026 tax calculator. Calculate 16% tax and CASS exactly.
cfd.altScreenerDesc: Identify the best opportunities on BVB with technical indicators (RSI, MACD) and fundamentals (P/E, ROE).
cfd.altAcademyDesc: Learn from scratch how to invest correctly, what technical indicators are, and how to read financial statements.
cfd.brokersTitle: Authorized brokers for real BVB stocks
cfd.brokersIntro: These are ASF/BVB-regulated brokers through which you can buy real stocks, not CFDs:
cfd.brokerTradeville: Romanian broker, most widely used on BVB
cfd.brokerBT: Banca Transilvania subsidiary, authorized BVB broker
cfd.brokerXTB: Warning: choose "Stocks" not "CFD". XTB offers both.
cfd.brokersDisclaimer: * FinRomania is not affiliated with any broker and receives no commissions for recommendations. This list is purely educational.
cfd.faq_q1: Can I lose more than I invested on CFDs?
cfd.faq_a1: Yes, absolutely! Leveraged CFDs can cause losses exceeding your initial investment. For example, with 1:10 leverage and 1,000 EUR invested, you control 10,000 EUR. A 10% adverse move means a total loss of your 1,000 EUR, plus potentially more (margin call). With real stocks, you can never lose more than you invested.
cfd.faq_q2: Why do Plus500 / eToro / XTB show different data than FinRomania?
cfd.faq_a2: FinRomania displays REAL data from official exchanges (BVB, NYSE, etc.) which stop after trading hours and are closed on weekends and holidays. CFD platforms like Plus500 are open 24/7 because you're not trading on the exchange — you're trading with the broker, who can set any price they want outside market hours ("synthetic" pricing).
cfd.faq_a3: Yes, CFDs are financial products regulated by ASF (Financial Supervisory Authority) in Romania and by ESMA at European level. However, ESMA imposes strict restrictions: maximum 1:30 leverage for retail, mandatory warnings that 74-89% of retail accounts lose money on CFDs.
cfd.faq_q4: If CFD stocks pay dividends, do I receive them?
cfd.faq_a4: You don't receive real dividends. The broker may credit a "dividend adjustment" to your account, but it's not the same as an official company dividend. You won't appear in the company's shareholder registry and have no voting rights at General Meetings.
cfd.faq_q5: How do I buy real BVB stocks?
cfd.faq_a5: Through authorized BVB brokers: Tradeville, BT Capital Partners, XTB ("Stocks" section, not CFD), Interactive Brokers. Open an account, deposit funds, and buy stocks directly. The shares appear in the Central Depository (Romania) and you are a real owner.
cfd.faq_a6: When your CFD losses exceed the guarantee amount (margin), the broker demands you deposit additional funds. If you don't, they automatically close your positions, often at the worst possible time. This doesn't exist with real stocks — your shares remain yours even if the price drops.
cfd.disclaimerText: Disclaimer: The content of this page is for educational purposes only and does not constitute financial advice. FinRomania is not authorized as an investment advisor. Investments involve risks. Before investing, consult a financial specialist authorized by ASF. Broker information is provided for informational purposes and may be updated independently.
cfd.ctaDesc: Use FinRomania for real data from official exchanges and make informed decisions.

disclaimerPage.title: Disclaimer
disclaimerPage.warningText: The information on FinRomania does NOT constitute investment advice. Any financial decision is solely your responsibility.
disclaimerPage.section1Text: All information, data, news, and analyses presented on the FinRomania platform are provided exclusively for informational and educational purposes. The content should not be construed as:
disclaimerPage.section1Item2: Recommendations to buy or sell financial instruments
disclaimerPage.section2Text: FinRomania is NOT a financial advisory firm, does not hold any authorization from the ASF (Financial Supervisory Authority), and does not provide investment consulting services.
disclaimerPage.section3Text: Although we make every effort to present accurate and up-to-date information, we do NOT guarantee:
disclaimerPage.section3Item1: The accuracy, completeness, or timeliness of the information
disclaimerPage.section3Item2: The absence of errors in the presented data
disclaimerPage.section3Item3: Real-time updates of prices or quotes
disclaimerPage.section4Text: News and information are aggregated from third-party sources (Ziarul Financiar, Profit.ro, Bursa, etc.). We assume no responsibility for the content, accuracy, or opinions expressed in these external sources.
disclaimerPage.section5Text1: Investing in financial instruments involves significant risks, including the partial or total loss of invested capital.
disclaimerPage.section5Text2: Past performance does not guarantee future results. You must fully understand the risks before investing and should not invest money you cannot afford to lose.
disclaimerPage.section6Text: Before making any investment decision, we recommend consulting an authorized financial advisor who can assess your individual financial situation and investment objectives.
disclaimerPage.section7Text: To the maximum extent permitted by law, FinRomania and its operators shall not be liable for any loss or damage (including, without limitation, financial losses, loss of profits, or loss of data) arising from the use of or inability to use this platform.
disclaimerPage.section8Text: Data regarding stocks listed on the Bucharest Stock Exchange (BVB) is provided by a licensed financial data provider. The data is real and updates automatically every 5 minutes. However, there may be delays or discrepancies compared to official BVB data. Always verify with official sources before making investment decisions.
disclaimerPage.section9Text: The FinRomania platform aggregates data from the following sources:
disclaimerPage.section9Item4Text: Aggregated from Romanian sources (Ziarul Financiar, Profit.ro, Bursa, Wall-Street)
disclaimerPage.section9Footer: Each source may have its own update and accuracy policies. FinRomania does not guarantee data provided by third parties.

termsPage.title: Terms and Conditions
termsPage.section1Text: By accessing and using the FinRomania platform, you agree to be bound by these Terms and Conditions. If you do not agree with these terms, please do not use our website.
termsPage.section2Text: FinRomania is a financial information platform that provides:
termsPage.section2Item2: Information on stocks listed on the Bucharest Stock Exchange
termsPage.section2Item3: Exchange rates from the National Bank of Romania
termsPage.section2Item4: Information on global stock market indices
termsPage.section3Text1: IMPORTANT: The information presented on FinRomania is exclusively for informational purposes and does NOT constitute investment advice, financial recommendations, or encouragement to buy or sell financial instruments.
termsPage.section3Text2: Investment decisions should be made based on your own research and, if necessary, in consultation with an authorized financial advisor. We assume no responsibility for financial losses resulting from decisions based on information from this platform.
termsPage.section4Text: The content of the FinRomania platform, including its logo, design, texts, and source code, is protected by copyright. Aggregated news is the property of the original sources and is used in accordance with copyright laws.
termsPage.section5Text: The data presented comes from the following sources:
termsPage.section5Item1Text: Ziarul Financiar, Profit.ro, Bursa, Wall-Street.ro, Capital.ro
termsPage.section5Item4Text: Simulated data (real data implementation in progress)
termsPage.section6Text: FinRomania does not guarantee the accuracy, completeness, or timeliness of the information presented. Data may be delayed or contain errors. Use the information at your own risk.
termsPage.section7Text: We reserve the right to modify, suspend, or discontinue the service at any time without prior notice. We do not guarantee the continuous availability of the platform.
termsPage.section8Text: We reserve the right to modify these Terms and Conditions at any time. Continued use of the platform after modifications constitutes acceptance of the new terms.
termsPage.section9Text: These terms are governed by the laws of Romania. Any dispute shall be resolved by the competent courts in Romania.
termsPage.section10Text: For questions about these Terms and Conditions:

privacyPage.title: Privacy Policy
privacyPage.section1Text: FinRomania ("we", "our", or "the Platform") respects the privacy of its visitors and users. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and protect your information when you visit our website.
privacyPage.section2Text: We may collect the following types of information:
privacyPage.section2Item1Text: IP address, browser type, pages visited, time of visit
privacyPage.section2Item2Text: We use cookies to enhance the user experience (see Cookie Policy)
privacyPage.section3Text: The information collected is used for:
privacyPage.section3Item2: Improving and personalizing the user experience
privacyPage.section3Item3: Analyzing how the website is used
privacyPage.section4Text: We do not sell, trade, or otherwise transfer your personal information to third parties, except where necessary for providing the service (for example, hosting providers).
privacyPage.section5Text: We implement appropriate security measures to protect your information against unauthorized access, alteration, disclosure, or destruction.
privacyPage.section6Text: Under the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR), you have the right to:
privacyPage.section6Item1: Access the personal data we hold about you
privacyPage.section7Text: For any questions regarding this Privacy Policy, you can contact us at:

cookiesPage.title: Cookie Policy
cookiesPage.section1Text: Cookies are small text files stored on your device when you visit a website. They allow the website to recognize you and remember certain information about your preferences.
cookiesPage.section4Text: You can control and delete cookies through your browser settings. Please note that disabling cookies may affect website functionality.
cookiesPage.section5Text: By continuing to browse our website, you consent to the use of cookies in accordance with this policy.
cookiesPage.section6Text: This Cookie Policy may be updated periodically. We recommend checking this page regularly to stay informed of any changes.
